CaseStateLatticeRegion:
- region "Case-state lattice":
  - text: Case-state lattice Select a state or route family to synchronize the lattice, inspector, and evidence tables. active state route-related state lineage emphasis
  - button "handoff received Phase 3 BookingIntent plus the proposed LineageCaseLink. Summary-only booking launch card inside the patient or staff shell."
  - button "capability checked BookingCapabilityResolution and BookingCapabilityProjection. Capability gate summary with allowed next actions."
  - button "searching local SearchPolicy plus BookingCapabilityResolution plus SlotSetSnapshot. Search-first workspace with calm loading, empty, or partial posture inside the same shell."
  - button "offers ready OfferSession plus ReservationTruthProjection plus rank proof. Offer list or calendar with explicit rank disclosure and truthful hold wording."
  - button "selecting OfferSession selection tuple and the selected anchor tuple hash. Selection state that preserves the chosen slot anchor across same-shell child routes."
  - button "revalidating BookingTransaction preflight, SearchPolicy, and current capability tuple. Selected slot remains visible while writable mutation is temporarily paused."
  - button "commit pending BookingTransaction and ReservationTruthProjection. Pending confirmation wording stays summary-first and suppresses false calmness."
  - button "booked BookingConfirmationTruthProjection and AppointmentRecord. Booked summary transitions into management inside the same shell."
  - button "confirmation pending BookingConfirmationTruthProjection. Chosen slot or booked summary stays visible until authoritative settlement lands."
  - button "supplier reconciliation pending ExternalConfirmationGate and BookingConfirmationTruthProjection. Same-shell recovery posture with explicit reconciliation explanation."
  - button "waitlisted WaitlistEntry, WaitlistDeadlineEvaluation, and WaitlistContinuationTruthProjection. Waitlist truth remains visible with deadline risk and dominant next step."
  - button "callback fallback WaitlistFallbackObligation and CallbackCase typed seam. Read-only provenance plus callback expectation summary."
  - button "fallback to hub WaitlistFallbackObligation and HubCoordinationCase typed seam. Read-only provenance plus governed handoff status."
  - button "booking failed BookingException and continuation truth. Recovery-only branch summary with no local writable controls."
  - button "managed AppointmentRecord, BookingConfirmationTruthProjection, and BookingManageSettlement. Appointment summary with manage, cancel, or reschedule child routes."
  - button "closed BookingCase branch settlement only; not request closure. Summary-only review or appointment history view."
CaseStateLattice:
- button "handoff received Phase 3 BookingIntent plus the proposed LineageCaseLink. Summary-only booking launch card inside the patient or staff shell."
- button "capability checked BookingCapabilityResolution and BookingCapabilityProjection. Capability gate summary with allowed next actions."
- button "searching local SearchPolicy plus BookingCapabilityResolution plus SlotSetSnapshot. Search-first workspace with calm loading, empty, or partial posture inside the same shell."
- button "offers ready OfferSession plus ReservationTruthProjection plus rank proof. Offer list or calendar with explicit rank disclosure and truthful hold wording."
- button "selecting OfferSession selection tuple and the selected anchor tuple hash. Selection state that preserves the chosen slot anchor across same-shell child routes."
- button "revalidating BookingTransaction preflight, SearchPolicy, and current capability tuple. Selected slot remains visible while writable mutation is temporarily paused."
- button "commit pending BookingTransaction and ReservationTruthProjection. Pending confirmation wording stays summary-first and suppresses false calmness."
- button "booked BookingConfirmationTruthProjection and AppointmentRecord. Booked summary transitions into management inside the same shell."
- button "confirmation pending BookingConfirmationTruthProjection. Chosen slot or booked summary stays visible until authoritative settlement lands."
- button "supplier reconciliation pending ExternalConfirmationGate and BookingConfirmationTruthProjection. Same-shell recovery posture with explicit reconciliation explanation."
- button "waitlisted WaitlistEntry, WaitlistDeadlineEvaluation, and WaitlistContinuationTruthProjection. Waitlist truth remains visible with deadline risk and dominant next step."
- button "callback fallback WaitlistFallbackObligation and CallbackCase typed seam. Read-only provenance plus callback expectation summary."
- button "fallback to hub WaitlistFallbackObligation and HubCoordinationCase typed seam. Read-only provenance plus governed handoff status."
- button "booking failed BookingException and continuation truth. Recovery-only branch summary with no local writable controls."
- button "managed AppointmentRecord, BookingConfirmationTruthProjection, and BookingManageSettlement. Appointment summary with manage, cancel, or reschedule child routes."
- button "closed BookingCase branch settlement only; not request closure. Summary-only review or appointment history view."
LineageFenceBraid:
- text: Lineage-and-fence braid Late supersession, identity repair, publication drift, and request ownership all stay binding after booking opens.
- strong: sourceDecisionEpochRef
- text: Mandatory lineage from Phase 3 decision truth into every Phase 4 mutation path.
- strong: sourceDecisionSupersessionRef
- text: Replacement triage epochs freeze booking mutation in place.
- strong: lineageCaseLinkRef
- text: The only canonical join from request lineage to booking work.
- strong: requestLifecycleLeaseRef
- text: Booking mutation remains lease-bound to the request lifecycle.
- strong: ownershipEpoch
- text: One active request ownership epoch fences booking mutation.
- strong: identityRepairBranchDispositionRef
- text: Wrong-patient correction can quarantine live booking posture without erasing provenance.
- strong: patientShellConsistencyProjectionRef
- text: All patient routes stay inside one governed signed-in shell.
- strong: patientEmbeddedSessionProjectionRef
- text: Embedded entry is separately validated and can freeze writes.
- strong: surfaceRouteContractRef
- text: Booking and appointment routes are explicit route-family contracts, not browser-history conventions.
- strong: surfacePublicationRef
- text: Live route publication determines whether mutation remains available.
- strong: runtimePublicationBundleRef
- text: Runtime publication is part of the same-shell safety boundary.
- strong: routeFreezeDispositionRef
- text: Route-freeze posture explains why the shell became read-only or recovery-only.
- strong: releaseRecoveryDispositionRef
- text: Release recovery can override calm route posture without changing booking workflow state.
RouteFamilyLadder:
- text: Route-family ladder Booking list, choose, confirm, manage, cancel, and reschedule stay inside one patient shell.
- 'button "same_shell_section_switch /appointments PatientAppointmentListProjection · dominant action: review_or_manage"'
- 'button "same_object_child /bookings/:bookingCaseId PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection · dominant action: search_or_resume" [pressed]'
- 'button "same_object_child /bookings/:bookingCaseId/select PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection · dominant action: select_slot"'
- 'button "same_object_child /bookings/:bookingCaseId/confirm PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection · dominant action: confirm_slot"'
- 'button "same_section_object_switch /appointments/:appointmentId PatientAppointmentManageProjection · dominant action: review_appointment"'
- 'button "same_object_child /appointments/:appointmentId/manage PatientAppointmentManageProjection · dominant action: manage_appointment"'
- 'button "same_object_child /appointments/:appointmentId/cancel PatientAppointmentManageProjection · dominant action: cancel_appointment"'
- 'button "same_object_child /appointments/:appointmentId/reschedule PatientAppointmentManageProjection · dominant action: reschedule_appointment"'
PatientProjectionMap:
- text: Patient-projection map Projection truth stays explicit so later frontend work cannot improvise booking semantics page by page.
- article:
  - strong: PatientAppointmentListProjection
  - text: List-shell truth for upcoming appointments, waitlist cards, and manage-entry actions.
- article:
  - strong: PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection
  - text: Single read model for slot discovery, selection, revalidation, confirm posture, and fallback guidance.
- article:
  - strong: PatientAppointmentManageProjection
  - text: Manage-shell truth for cancel, reschedule, repair, and same-anchor pending states.
- article:
  - strong: PatientAppointmentArtifactProjection
  - text: Artifact and attendance-summary projection bound to the same appointment anchor and return contract.
InspectorPanel:
- complementary:
  - text: Inspector Selected state and route family remain synchronized here.
  - heading "State" [level=3]
  - paragraph:
    - strong: waitlisted
    - text: The case is still lawfully waiting for local supply and has not yet crossed into callback or hub fallback. WaitlistEntry, WaitlistDeadlineEvaluation, and WaitlistContinuationTruthProjection.
  - heading "Governing predicate" [level=3]
  - paragraph: Active WaitlistEntry exists, offerabilityState is waitlist_safe or at_risk, and required fallback route remains stay_local_waitlist.
  - heading "Route family" [level=3]
  - paragraph:
    - strong: /bookings/:bookingCaseId
    - text: same_object_child · history push · dominant action search_or_resume
  - heading "Authority separation" [level=3]
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - strong: Booking case workflow
      - text: ": BookingCase.status"
    - listitem:
      - strong: Capability truth
      - text: ": BookingCapabilityResolution.capabilityState"
    - listitem:
      - strong: Reservation and hold truth
      - text: ": ReservationTruthProjection.truthState"
    - listitem:
      - strong: Confirmation truth
      - text: ": BookingConfirmationTruthProjection.confirmationTruthState"
    - listitem:
      - strong: Manage posture
      - text: ": BookingManageSettlement + manage exposure fields"
    - listitem:
      - strong: Route publication and recovery
      - text: ": SurfacePublication + RuntimePublicationBundle + RouteFreezeDisposition + ReleaseRecoveryDisposition"
  - heading "Linked projections" [level=3]
  - list:
    - listitem:
      - text: PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection uses
      - strong: selectedReservationTruthRef
    - listitem:
      - text: PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection uses
      - strong: selectedConfirmationTruthRef
    - listitem:
      - text: PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection uses
      - strong: selectedWaitlistContinuationTruthRef
    - listitem:
      - text: PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection uses
      - strong: capacityRankProofRef
    - listitem:
      - text: PatientAppointmentWorkspaceProjection uses
      - strong: rankDisclosurePolicyRef
